about.bio.1: My mind runs on problems. Whether I'm analyzing a DTC subscription funnel, architecting a product roadmap, or making decisions about investment properties I've built from the ground up — I'm always asking what's broken, what data reveals, and what the next iteration should be. That restlessness is the engine.
about.bio.2: What people notice most is the combination: I think in systems and communicate in plain language. That's what makes cross-functional leadership actually work.
about.quote.text: The best digital product decisions start with a clear problem statement, not a solution handed down from above.
about.title: Ownership, iteration, and a metrics-first mindset
about.value.0.desc: Every roadmap decision starts with asking the uncomfortable question — what problem are we actually solving?
about.value.0.title: Problem-first thinker
about.value.1.desc: Success metrics defined before a line of spec is written. Post-launch reviews close the loop every time.
about.value.1.title: Metrics-first executor
about.value.2.desc: Engineering partnership is not a handoff. It is a peer relationship built on shared accountability and clear specs.
about.value.2.title: Engineering partner
about.value.3.desc: Iteration is not a phase — it is the operating model. Data changes, priorities shift, and the roadmap adapts.
about.value.3.title: Iterative by default

modal.project.0.challenge: Within four months of deployment, the AI-driven persona platform directly informed targeted DTC marketing and subscription engagement strategies that reversed a negative profit trajectory — moving the business from a –17% operating margin to +2%. Improved customer retention and subscription renewals, increased average cart size, and reduced onboarding friction for new members — demonstrating how a rigorous product strategy grounded in behavioral data and defined success metrics creates measurable commercial outcomes.

modal.project.0.kpi.1.label: Customer Capture

modal.project.0.outcome.0: Reversed negative profitability; from a –17% operating margin to +2% within four months of launch.
modal.project.0.outcome.1: 15% improvement in customer retention and subscription renewals driven by real, actionable behavioral insights.
modal.project.0.outcome.2: 10% increase in average cart size and customer lifetime value tied directly to roadmap initiatives.
modal.project.0.outcome.3: Reduced customer acquisition friction and onboarding effort by proactively surfacing needs before drop-off.
modal.project.0.outcome.4: Scaled organizational awareness across ~40 users in sales, customer service, field development, and executive leadership.
modal.project.0.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.0.overview: An AI-driven persona platform built on live business intelligence data — combining behavioral, demographic, and psychological insights to enable teams to understand not just who customers are, but how and why they make decisions. Designed and delivered as a digital product initiative with defined success metrics, structured intake, and a measurable post-launch performance review.

modal.project.0.quote.text: This platform fundamentally changed how we understand and engage our customers. Within four months, it enabled more precise targeting and smarter interactions that helped move our operating margin from –17% to +2%, while strengthening customer trust and long-term engagement.

modal.project.0.title: AI Persona Agent
modal.project.1.challenge: Architected and led delivery of a comprehensive design system to modernize a fragmented DTC web and portal experience spanning marketing, sales, consumer-facing subscription flows, and internal communications tools. The goal was not only visual renewal but a durable system aligned to business outcomes — improving consistency, delivery velocity, and engineering execution speed across the full product lifecycle.
modal.project.1.kpi.0.label: Reduction in Time to Deliver
modal.project.1.kpi.1.label: Designers Impacted
modal.project.1.kpi.2.label: More Deliverables per Sprint
modal.project.1.kpi.3.label: Designer Hours Saved
modal.project.1.outcome.0: Consistent design and interaction patterns across all DTC and subscription products, eliminating inconsistencies between designers and engineering teams.
modal.project.1.outcome.1: A shared source of truth clarifying scope, deliverables, and acceptance criteria for all product artifacts.
modal.project.1.outcome.2: Alignment between product strategy and business goals embedded directly into system standards.
modal.project.1.outcome.3: Increased confidence and autonomy of designers through clear, repeatable patterns that engineering could execute without friction.
modal.project.1.outcome.4: Executive trust through visible, consistent standards referenced across all product deliverables org-wide.
modal.project.1.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.1.overview: Delivered as a hybrid greenfield and progressive migration, the system lives in Figma and is referenced directly in Contentful — enabling designers, engineers, and product leaders to operate from a shared source of truth. Adoption materially improved delivery velocity, product quality, and team confidence, transforming design from a reactive service into a scalable, strategic product capability.

modal.project.1.quote.text: This new system changed how we work. Delivery time was cut by roughly 50%. Visual and interaction quality jumped by about 80%. We went from weeks assembling concepts to delivering clean, standardized prototypes in days. It raised the bar for every project.
modal.project.1.skills.heading: Skills Applied
modal.project.1.title: Design System Architect
modal.project.2.challenge: Defined the product strategy and experience design for a new membership join flow and entrepreneurial advancement surface. The core challenge is twofold: making it genuinely easy for new and existing members to subscribe and join in compliance with requirements, and ensuring prospective members clearly understand the product and business value — without confusion, friction, or trust erosion at critical conversion moments.
modal.project.2.kpi.0.label: Target NPS Increase
modal.project.2.kpi.1.label: Touchpoints Redesigned
modal.project.2.kpi.2.label: Projected Churn Reduction
modal.project.2.kpi.3.label: Target Completion
modal.project.2.outcome.0: Clarified subscription value proposition, reducing hesitation and confusion at tier selection and activation.
modal.project.2.outcome.1: Improved trust and transparency in cart and checkout through clearer expectations and guided success states.
modal.project.2.outcome.2: Enabled subscription-led membership activation as a first-class product surface rather than an optional afterthought.
modal.project.2.outcome.3: Reduced friction for members advancing toward entrepreneurial participation and business sharing opportunities.
modal.project.2.outcome.4: Established a scalable join and advancement framework aligned with long-term retention, LTV, and subscription growth.
modal.project.2.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.2.overview: Reframes subscription membership as a guided progression rather than a transactional gate — aligning interaction design, social platforms, and subscription mechanics across landing pages, cart, and checkout. Designed to encourage first-time visitors to join with a product subscription and confidently move toward business sharing. The result is a scalable DTC foundation improving conversion, reducing abandonment at critical moments, and supporting sustainable subscription and retention growth.
modal.project.2.overview.heading: Overview
modal.project.2.phase.0.label: Problem Framing & Risk Identification
modal.project.2.phase.1.label: Product Strategy & Growth Alignment

modal.project.2.phases.heading: Project Phases
modal.project.2.quote.text: By simplifying the membership journey and aligning it with subscription-based product engagement, we plan to reduce effort at the most fragile points of conversion. Early analysis shows faster completion times, higher subscription attachment at join, and improved confidence — an update that can potentially support both revenue and long-term retention.
modal.project.2.skills.heading: Skills Applied
modal.project.2.title: Membership Join Experience
modal.project.4.challenge: Leading the end-to-end product refactoring of cart and checkout for a high-growth DTC subscription business facing critical revenue leakage from checkout abandonment exceeding 80%. Declining consumer trust and checkout flows diverging significantly from modern DTC standards positioned this as a business recovery initiative — not a visual refresh. Owned the full product roadmap: intake, prioritization, functional spec writing, engineering partnership, and post-launch performance reviews.
modal.project.4.kpi.0.label: Monthly Cart Interactions
modal.project.4.kpi.1.label: Abandonment Reduction Target
modal.project.4.kpi.2.label: Consumer Trust Driver
modal.project.4.kpi.3.label: Target Go-Live
modal.project.4.outcome.0: Clear, confidence-driven cart experience addressing consumer uncertainty at the point of subscription and purchase.
modal.project.4.outcome.1: Reduced checkout effort by eliminating unnecessary steps, ambiguity, and friction in the subscription activation flow.
modal.project.4.outcome.2: Subscription-first cart experience — enabling subscriptions as a first-class action directly within the cart surface.
modal.project.4.outcome.3: Parity with modern DTC retail standards, closing the gap with top-performing subscription e-commerce competitors.
modal.project.4.outcome.4: Revenue, retention, and trust metric growth through isolated, measurable A/B tested product improvements.
modal.project.4.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.4.overview: Restoring consumer trust, reducing cognitive load, and enabling revenue-positive subscription behaviors directly within the cart — including subscriptions, upsell, and frictionless express checkout. Partnering with executive leadership, PMO, and engineering to establish a product-led roadmap with defined success metrics, structured intake, functional specs, and post-launch performance reviews aligned to business outcomes.

modal.project.4.quote.text: Reframing cart and checkout as a subscription growth system rather than a technical necessity — early validations expect meaningful reductions in abandonment, faster checkout completion, and a measurable lift in subscription and membership adoption directly impacting revenue and consumer trust.
modal.project.4.skills.heading: Skills Applied
modal.project.4.title: Cart & Checkout
modal.project.5.challenge: Leading the product strategy and roadmap for a new sitewide intelligent search surface to address a critical trust and relevance failure. Legacy search returned inaccurate results, forcing users to rely on external search engines to find products — directly undermining DTC conversion, subscription activation, and member confidence in the platform.
modal.project.5.kpi.0.label: AI-Driven Search Results
modal.project.5.kpi.1.label: SERP Accuracy Target
modal.project.5.kpi.2.label: Revenue & Retention Impact
modal.project.5.kpi.3.label: Official Kickoff
modal.project.5.outcome.0: Restore consumer trust in on-site search by prioritizing exact, intent-matched results in the most visible positions.
modal.project.5.outcome.1: Reduce user effort by guiding searches that yield ambiguous or no results rather than failing silently at critical discovery moments.
modal.project.5.outcome.2: Accelerate paths to cart and checkout through intelligent product recommendations and subscription upsell logic.
modal.project.5.outcome.3: Unify DTC discovery across products, content, support, and business resources into a single, coherent search experience.
modal.project.5.outcome.4: Establish search as a strategic retention and subscription growth lever supporting LTV and member engagement.
modal.project.5.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.5.overview: Search is a core DTC consumer experience layer — not a utility. By combining deterministic relevance logic with a custom AI layer, the new system delivers exact, high-confidence results, guides users when intent is unclear, and surfaces recommendations that accelerate cart, checkout, subscription, and retention actions. Owned as a product initiative with defined success metrics, structured intake, functional specs, and engineering partnership from day one.

modal.project.5.quote.text: By rebuilding search around relevance and intent rather than keywords alone, we potentially reduce friction at the earliest stage of the consumer journey.
